sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Now I see:
- Merged box (c, id=1): row 24-31, col 28-31, with 2 blue squares (id=3 and id=8) inside - the middle box and gray box merged!
- White strip (W, id=2): row 24, col 32-35
- Player (N, id=4): row 25-27, col 32-35
- Left box (c, id=5): row 28-31, col 16-19, with blue square (id=7) inside
- Blue bar (b, id=6): row 28-31, col 32-39 (irregular shape), no children
So when I moved UP, the gray box merged with the middle box, creating a larger box with 2 blue squares. This is interesting!
The blue bar is now at col 32-39, and the player is at col 32-35. The player is now adjacent to the blue bar.
Let me think about what the goal is. The merged box has 2 blue squares, the left box has 1 blue square, and the blue bar has 0 blue squares. Maybe the goal is to get all blue squares into the blue bar?
But I'm not sure how to do that. Let me try pressing SPACE to see if something happens.
Actually, looking at the image, the player is now on the right side of the merged box, and the blue bar is below the player. Let me try moving DOWN to see if the player can move down.
Wait, actually I notice the player moved from row 28-31 to row 25-27. So the player moved up along with the gray box. The gray box was following the player.
Let me try pressing SPACE to activate/deposit something.
